name: arctos-robot-controller-comprehensive-tests
description: Comprehensive test suite for 100% code and UI coverage

scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:all: npm run test:backend:coverage && npm run test:frontend && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:backend:coverage && npm run test:frontend && echo 'Coverage reports generated'
scripts.test:integration: npm run start:test-server & sleep 5 && npm run test:e2e && kill %1
scripts.test:smoke: npx playwright test e2e-tests/comprehensive-e2e.spec.ts --grep 'should display main application interface|should establish WebSocket connection'
scripts.test:stress: for i in {1..10}; do npm run test:e2e; done
scripts.coverage:report: npm run test:backend:coverage && cd client && npm test -- --coverage --watchAll=false && npx nyc report --reporter=html --report-dir=../coverage/combined
